title: Modern Web Development: Beyond the Basics
excerpt: Exploring advanced techniques and tools that are shaping the future of web development.
content:
The web development landscape has evolved dramatically over the past few years. Today's developers have access to powerful tools and frameworks that make building complex applications more accessible than ever.

The Modern Stack

Modern web development isn't just about HTML, CSS, and JavaScript anymore. We're working with:

  • React and Vue.js for dynamic user interfaces
  • Node.js for server-side JavaScript
  • TypeScript for type-safe development
  • Tailwind CSS for utility-first styling

Performance Matters

With users expecting lightning-fast experiences, performance optimization has become crucial. Techniques like lazy loading, code splitting, and progressive web apps are no longer optional—they're essential.

The key is to balance functionality with performance, ensuring your applications are both feature-rich and fast.
author: Drew Walton
